data.title: Tanium and Computacenter partner to secure Government of Canada with real-time visibility; Tanium's Autonomous IT Platform gets ATO for EVAS program.
data.description: Based in Vancouver, British Columbia, Tanium, a leading Autonomous IT company, has partnered with Computacenter Canada Inc., a global technology and services provider, to offer real-time visibility into the networks and endpoints of the Canadian government. The joint team from Computacenter and Tanium in Canada has successfully secured Authority to Operate (ATO) for Tanium's Autonomous IT Platform within the Government of Canada's Endpoint Visibility, Awareness and Security (EVAS) program. This partnership will provide crucial insights into the government's network and endpoints.

data.title: Crest Surf Clubs partners with Kreation Capital and Sea Purity Investments, appoints Matt Hayden as Director of Capital Markets. Strengthening capital leadership.
data.description: In Shirley, New York on January 14, 2026, Crest Surf Clubs revealed collaborations with Kreation Capital and Sea Purity Investments. These partnerships signify Crest's bolstering of capital markets and development expertise. This move comes as the company progresses in securing financing support.

data.title: Mixed signals: PEPE's RSI 65.01 neutral, MACD bearish. Analysts predict $0.0000065-$0.00000690 by Jan 2026.
data.description: The cryptocurrency PEPE is currently displaying neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 65.01 and bearish momentum on the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicator. Analysts’ predictions indicate a target price range for PEPE between $0.0000065 and $0.00000690 by the end of January 2026.

data.title: United Real Estate launches URESI program for agents to build wealth as investor-entrepreneurs, exclusive to United Affiliated Agents.
data.description: United Real Estate has recently introduced the United Residential Investment (URESI) Program on January 14, 2026, in Dallas. This program is exclusively available to United affiliated agents. By participating in URESI, agents are equipped with a comprehensive set of tools to help them generate long-term wealth.

data.title: DataSnipper saved $1.4B for audit and finance teams in 2025 through intelligent automation platform.
data.description: In Amsterdam on January 14, 2026, DataSnipper, an advanced automation platform for audit and finance, concluded a successful 2025 by achieving over $1.4 billion in productivity savings for audit and finance departments. Throughout the year, the company introduced AI Agents and various innovative features to enhance their services.

data.title: 113 epilepsy organizations express concerns about leadership change at NINDS, uniting to voice significant concerns.
data.description: In Bowie, Maryland on January 14, 2026, a total of 113 organizations have come together to address various aspects related to epilepsy. These organizations encompass individuals living with epilepsy, caregivers, physicians, healthcare providers, epilepsy centers, researchers, and more. They collaborate to raise substantial concerns regarding the situation at hand.

data.title: Electro Rent celebrates 60th anniversary, empowering engineers with test equipment solutions since 1965 - providing flexibility and confidence.
data.description: Located in West Hills, California, Electro Rent commemorates its 60th anniversary as a key player in the test equipment and technology solutions industry. Since its establishment in 1965, the company has been instrumental in assisting engineers, innovators, and procurement teams in materializing their ideas swiftly and confidently. Initially recognized for pioneering test equipment rental services, Electro Rent has expanded its offerings to include a wide array of solutions such as rental, leasing, certified pre-owned, and new equipment. With a focus on asset optimization, the firm continues to be a reliable partner for individuals and teams seeking enhanced speed, flexibility, and assurance in their projects.

data.title: Channel Partners Conference & Expo in 2026 introduces CEO Track for tech advisory, agent leaders, and C-suite execs in Las Vegas. Bana Qashu Young from BanaTech Consulting to head interactive discussions. #CPExpo #MSPSummit
data.description: In Las Vegas, the Channel Partners Conference & Expo and MSP Summit 2026 revealed the introduction of a CEO Track, offering exclusive content for technology advisors, agent leaders, and C-suite executives. Bana Qashu Young, the Managing Partner & Founder of BanaTech Consulting, has been appointed as the CEO Track Chair. This premium content series aims to provide advanced leadership insights and strategic foresight in the rapidly changing technology services channel. Young will moderate interactive discussions as part of this new initiative.

data.title: ALGO price may reach $0.16-$0.19 in February, with RSI at 60.5 & MACD showing recovery from oversold levels. Analysts predict targets in 4-6 weeks.
data.description: Algorand is displaying positive indicators as its Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 60.5, suggesting potential for a bullish trend. Furthermore, the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) is indicating a turnaround from oversold conditions. Analysts are predicting price targets of $0.16 to $0.19 for Algorand within a timeframe of 4 to 6 weeks, highlighting a potential uptrend for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Crowe LLP invests in Crowe Advisory Services India LLP, enhancing global reach. Opportunity expansion in market.
data.description: A US company has recently partnered with Crowe Advisory Services India to enhance its worldwide capabilities and broaden its market reach. On January 14, 2026, Crowe LLP, a prominent firm specializing in public accounting and consulting, disclosed a strategic investment in Crowe Advisory Services India LLP. This move aims to strengthen their global presence and open up new avenues for growth.

data.title: IBM will announce Q4 2025 financial results on Jan 28, 2026, 5:00 p.m. ET. Conference call can be accessed at www.ibm.com/investor.
data.description: In Armonk, New York, IBM (NYSE: IBM) has scheduled a conference call on January 28, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. ET to review its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2025. The live webcast of the earnings call will be available on www.ibm.com/investor.
